Article Title: Arvind Kejriwal: Defiance or sabotage? What AAP's move in Kerala signals for Congress in assembly polls
Article Text:
Watch Bengal Deja Vu For Left In Kerala? BJP Could Help Congress Win, Says Yashwant Deshmukh Bengal Deja Vu For Left In Kerala? BJP Could Help Congress Win, Says Yashwant Deshmukh

.

Is Delhi’s revenge being served in Kerala?

.

.

Coalition to confrontation

.

To diminish Congress’s footprint?

To repeat Gujarat in Kerala?

To increase AAP’s footprint?

Rahul, Priyanka and Tharoor’s Kerala

Kejriwal vs Rahul?

NEW DELHI: Does Aam Aadmi Party not want Congress to win in Kerala assembly polls?INDIA bloc’s inability to form a unified front ahead of the Kerala assembly polls was exposed spectacularly after Arvind Kejriwal 's Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) released successive lists of candidates, signalling its intent to fight a full-scale battle across all 140 seats in Kerala.The southern state, recently rechristened Keralam in a nod to its cultural and linguistic heritage, now stands as the latest battleground where AAP's ambitions clash head-on with Congress.Kerala’s electoral rhythm has long resisted continuity, with voters mostly denying incumbents a second straight term. That pattern places Congress, the principal opposition, in a seemingly favourable position in the race for power in Thiruvananthapuram.Yet, AAP’s assertive entry adds a twist. Is Kejriwal ’s party merely expanding its footprint, or subtly complicating Congress’s path to power? With limited organisational depth in the Malayalam-speaking state, AAP may not hold significant relevance, but with Arvind Kejriwal and his team emerging from the shadow of the Delhi liquor case, their presence could still, if only marginally, alter the political equation in Kerala.The ruling Left, also part of the broader opposition fold, remains Congress’s primary rival, while the BJP trails as a distant third. In this triangular contest, AAP may not significantly dent the Left or the BJP, but it could influence the margins where elections are often decided, by chipping away at Congress’s vote share just enough to alter the final verdict.2025 began with the startling defeat of the Aam Aadmi Party in Delhi. Earlier, the reluctant allies, AAP and Congress had decided to contest separately, with Congress, having little to lose, launching a belligerent campaign against the ruling Arvind Kejriwal-led dispensation.The grand old party also found an opening as the Kejriwal cabinet came under the scanner in the Delhi liquor policy case, with agencies like the CBI and ED probing the matter. Several senior AAP leaders, including Kejriwal and his deputy Manish Sisodia, faced legal trouble, leading to a phase where the government functioned under the chief ministership of party colleague and loyalist Atishi.While AAP’s defeat ultimately came at the hands of the BJP, Congress also played a significant, if indirect, role in preventing its INDIA bloc ally from securing a fourth consecutive term.The “vote-cutting” factor proved crucial in several constituencies, including New Delhi, where Sandeep Dikshit, son of former chief minister Sheila Dikshit, was fielded against Kejriwal. Though he finished a distant third, the votes he secured contributed to Kejriwal’s defeat and helped the BJP’s Parvesh Verma emerge as a “giant killer.”Hypothetically, had those votes gone to Kejriwal, the outcome might have been different. The AAP’s tally fell sharply from 62 to 22 seats, while Congress once again failed to open its account.The herculean efforts that brought AAP and Congress into an arranged marriage to counter the strong force of the BJP in the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, despite years of political bitterness, unravelled once again in the 2025 assembly polls, reflecting a familiar pattern of rivalry.AAP, which rose from the India Against Corruption movement led by Anna Hazare, had directly challenged the government led by Sheila Dikshit and went on to establish a dominant hold over Delhi, reducing Congress from a ruling force to total insignificance.The Congress, once under Sheila Dikshit’s strong leadership for 15 years, has failed to win a single seat in the last two assembly elections (2020 and 2025), and has also drawn blanks in three consecutive Lok Sabha polls (2014, 2019, and 2024).Just as Congress dented AAP’s prospects in the Delhi assembly, AAP may now impact Congress’s chances in states like Kerala, as it seeks to maintain its relevance within the national opposition space.Lok Sabha allies turned Assembly rivals, the battle between the estranged partners was anything but graceful.At one rally, Arvind Kejriwal did not hold back: “The problem with Congress is its sense of entitlement. They think they have a divine right to lead the opposition just because of their past, even when they have zero presence on the ground. They are not fighting the BJP; they are fighting regional parties that actually defeat the BJP. In Delhi, Congress is nothing but a ‘vote-cutter’ meant to help the BJP.”Congress, in turn, capitalised on the troubles surrounding the Delhi excise policy case, hitting AAP where it hurt the most.Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra led rallies across Delhi, branding Kejriwal and other AAP leaders as “corrupt.” In one such rally, Rahul Gandhi remarked: “Kejriwal ji keeps lying. The way Narendra Modi lies, Kejriwal lies too. There isn’t much difference between them. But I will tell you one thing—Kejriwal is probably more cunning and sophisticated than even the Prime Minister in how he misleads people.”Weeks later, when a Delhi court discharged Kejriwal and his colleagues in the liquor policy case, Congress alleged it was part of a larger BJP strategy of “Congress-mukt Bharat.”Congress spokesperson Pawan Khera attacked the BJP, calling it an “Icchadhari naag” (shape-shifting serpent), and accused it of using central agencies as political tools.Kejriwal retaliated sharply, questioning Congress’s claims and targeting its leadership: “Kejriwal went to jail. Did Robert Vadra go to jail? Sanjay Singh went to jail. Did Rahul Gandhi go to jail? Did Sonia Gandhi go to jail? What is Congress saying? Does it have no shame?”Congress, the grand old party with roots in the independence movement, has been grappling with vulnerability for over a decade.Beyond Delhi, it has steadily lost ground across multiple states, allowing the BJP to expand its dominance in national politics. This decline has also opened space for other players to challenge its position within the opposition.Among states like West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, and Kerala which are going to polls, Kerala appears to be the one where Congress still has a realistic chance of returning to power by dislodging the Left. That makes it a crucial battleground.In such a scenario, AAP’s entry could be seen as an attempt to dent Congress further, creating a situation where it will fight for relevance while also limiting Congress’s growth.Kejriwal’s Kerala push, with candidates across constituencies, could help position AAP as a more serious national player. The state offers a relatively low-risk opportunity, allowing AAP to contest without heavy stakes while keeping both BJP and Congress in check.From Delhi and Punjab, Arvind Kejriwal has established a firm political foothold, successfully running a full-fledged government in Punjab under party colleague Bhagwant Mann, while also having governed the Union Territory of Delhi for over a decade with a commanding presence in the Assembly.However, the journey of the Aam Aadmi Party has not been limited to Delhi alone. Its steady, often indirect expansion has positioned Kejriwal as an emerging alternative in national politics. He has also made inroads into Gujarat, long considered a bastion of Narendra Modi.In its Gujarat debut, AAP secured over 13 percent of the vote, significantly impacting Congress. In the 2017 Assembly elections, Congress had secured 42.2 percent of the vote, putting up a strong fight against the BJP after Modi’s shift to national politics. However, AAP’s entry in 2022 disrupted that balance, reducing Congress’s vote share to 27.7 percent.While AAP made an impressive debut with around 13 percent votes, the BJP registered only a marginal increase—from about 50 percent to 53 percent.A similar pattern could unfold in Kerala, where AAP may not emerge as a dominant force but could influence the outcome by cutting into Congress’s vote share, potentially benefiting the incumbent Left—much like it did in Gujarat.The AAP, since its birth in 2013 out of Anna movement, has been in a constant effort to expand its footprint across India. So why not Kerala?For Arvind Kejriwal, ambition has never been confined to Delhi. After dismantling the long-standing dominance of Sheila Dikshit, he quickly stepped onto the national stage, taking on Narendra Modi in the 2014 Lok Sabha elections. The contest in Varanasi may have ended in defeat, but it marked Kejriwal’s arrival as a major challenger.He secured over 20 percent of the vote, enough to push Congress to a distant third in Varanasi. Its candidate, Ajay Rai, managed only around 7 percent.The Kerala foray, then, is less an outlier and more a continuation of that journey, an attempt to test the party’s reach in the far south.Beyond its strongholds in Delhi and Punjab, AAP has steadily ventured into new political terrains.In Gujarat, it emerged as a significant player with over 13 percent of the vote, largely at Congress’s expense. In Goa, it secured nearly 7 percent and won two seats, once again cutting into Congress’s base.The party has even marked its presence in Jammu and Kashmir, with Mehraj Malik winning from Doda.From the northernmost reaches of J&K to AAP's a newfound interest in the southern edge of Kerala.Kejriwal’s entry into Kerala carries symbolic weight, especially for Congress, for whom the state has, in recent years, become a crucial political anchor. In moments of crisis, both Gandhi family scions, Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, turned to Kerala.In 2019, when Rahul Gandhi lost his very own Amethi seat, it was Wayanad that delivered him a resounding victory. He returned to Wayanad again in 2024, winning comfortably, though he eventually chose to retain Rae Bareli.“I was a stranger to you and yet you believed in me. You embraced me with unbridled love and affection. It didn't matter which political formation you supported, it didn't matter which community you were from or which religion you believed in or which language you spoke,” Rahul said.“I am sad, but I am consoled because my sister Priyanka will be there to represent you. I am confident that she will do an excellent job of being your MP if you decide to giver her the opportunity. My central commitment to both you and the people of Rae Bareli is that we will fight and defeat the hatred and violence being spread in the country,” he added.Stepping aside from Wayanad, Rahul Gandhi thanked the electorate and paved the way for Priyanka Gandhi Vadra’s electoral debut from the same constituency. She went on to secure a resounding victory in the bypolls, further cementing the family’s connection with the state.After her win, Priyanka said, “I thank the people of Wayanad for giving me the honor to represent them.It’s a testament to the fact that my brother worked hard there, their love for him, and their trust in me. I feel it’s a great honor, and I will respect it fully.”Beyond the Gandhis, Kerala is also home to one of Congress’s most prominent national faces, Shashi Tharoor, a three-time MP from Thiruvananthapuram.Against this backdrop, Kejriwal’s Kerala push is not just another electoral experiment, it is a move that could unsettle established equations and complicate the political calculus for the state’s entrenched players.After the formation of the INDIA bloc, the BJP-led NDA retained power at the Centre, with Rahul Gandhi becoming Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha.While Rahul rose to that position, questions over his leadership ambitions persisted. Within the opposition bloc, differences began surfacing, and AAP’s stance often appeared less aligned with him.AAP, at various points, has attempted to project Kejriwal as a potential national challenger to Narendra Modi, subtly sidelining Rahul Gandhi’s prospects.With repeated electoral setbacks for Congress and AAP’s aggressive expansion, the contest within the opposition space may no longer be just against the BJP, but also among its own key players
Article Summary: The southern state stands as the latest battleground where AAP's ambitions clash head-on with Congress. With limited organisational depth in the Malayalam- speaking state, AAP may not hold significant relevance. But with Arvind Kejriwal and his team emerging from the shadow of the Delhi liquor case, their presence could still, if only marginally, alter the political equation.

Article Title: Wards to flowers: Tulip Garden trip for young cancer fighters
Article Text:
Image: ANI

SRINAGAR:

TOI

Hope blooms in Srinagar’s Tulip Garden. Some cancer-struck kids just came back with rich pickings.The children were brought to the garden along Dal Lake on Monday from Sher-i-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences (SKIMS) as part of the hospital’s immunotherapy efforts --- strengthening the immune system with hope, optimism and positivity. The children numbered around a dozen. The oldest was 18 and the youngest only four.The transformation was swift. When an SKIMS bus carrying the children left the hospital, the mood inside was subdued. Many wore masks. Their attendants sat quietly. By the time they reached the garden, the atmosphere inside the bus had changed. The children’s faces lit up at the sight of the tulips, with many appearing more relaxed as the visit progressed.In photos released later, the group was smiling together, capturing a rare moment of ease away from the grim hospital wards. “The human body’s internal immunity not only fights bacterial and viral infections but can also fight and kill cancer cells. The outing of these children was part of immunotherapy treatment. We are trying to boost the immunity of these children, which can help make our treatment more effective,” SKIMS director M.Ashraf Ganie toldFeedback from doctors accompanying the children indicated great improvement in mood compared to when they were in hospital. “The children were very happy . It gives both the children and their families reassurance that this is not something they cannot fight,” Ganie said.This was the first such SKIMS initiative and the hospital had been preparing for nearly a month. “We planned the outing in accordance with the children’s chemotherapy schedules so that no doses were missed. Doctors accompanied them throughout and all precautions were taken,” Ganie said, adding meals were also arranged for the children and attendants during the trip.The hospital plans to assess the impact of the initiative formally through questionnaire-based feedback from the kids and their attendants. “The findings will help determine whether similar programmes can be organised in the future as part of a holistic approach to paediatric cancer care,” Ganie said.
Article Summary: The children were brought to the garden along Dal Lake on Monday from Sher-i- Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences (SKIMS) The children numbered around a dozen. The oldest was 18 and the youngest only four. The outing of these children was part of immunotherapy treatment.

Article Title: Angel Reese: Angel Reese traded in WNBA move before draft as Caitlin Clark rivalry takes surprising new direction
Article Text:
Angel Reese (Image Via Getty)

Angel Reese joins Atlanta Dream after Chicago Sky exit while Caitlin Clark rivalry and past tensions remain in focus

Angel Reese is starting a new chapter in her WNBA career, and it has come quite suddenly. The Chicago Sky have traded the 23-year-old forward to the Atlanta Dream just before the draft, ending a run that had already seen its share of tension. The move comes after months of questions around her future with the team.The timing is hard to ignore. Reese had openly shown frustration last season when Chicago missed the playoffs again. Now, with this trade confirmed, things have finally shifted. For fans, this is not just a team change. It also adds a fresh layer to her rivalry with Caitlin Clark as both continue to shape the league in their own way.Angel Reese confirmed the news herself on X, sharing photos in her new team colors and writing, “An Angel’s DREAM. ATL WHAT UP?!” In a statement released by the team, she said,“I’m beyond grateful for the opportunity to join the Atlanta Dream organization. I’m focused on continuing to grow my game, competing at the highest level, connecting with the fans, and giving everything I’ve got to the Dream.”The trade deal sends Reese to Atlanta in exchange for first round picks in 2027 and 2028. The Dream also receive the right to swap second round picks with Chicago in 2028.Reese was drafted seventh overall in 2024, the same class that included Caitlin Clark. Since then, she has built a strong record.In two seasons, she averaged 14 points and 12.8 rebounds per game and recorded 49 double doubles. She also made the All Rookie Team and set a record for rebounds per game in her debut season.Still, her time in Chicago was not smooth. Last year, she openly spoke about her frustration after missing the playoffs. In an interview with the Chicago Tribune, she said she might need to “move in a different direction and do what’s best for me.” That moment created a lot of discussion around her future.Now, Atlanta sees her as a key part of their plan. Head coach Karl Smesko said, “Angel’s ability to impact the game on both ends of the floor is elite. Her energy, toughness and instincts will thrive in our system.”General Manager Dan Padover added, “She has already proven herself as one of the most impactful players in the league. This is an exciting moment for our organization.”Reese joins a strong roster that already includes Allisha Gray, Naz Hillmon, and Brionna Jones. The Dream are coming off a strong season and will open their 2026 campaign against the Las Vegas Aces on May 17.
Article Summary: Angel Reese joins Atlanta Dream after Chicago Sky exit while Caitlin Clark rivalry and past tensions remain in focus. Reese had openly shown frustration last season when Chicago missed the playoffs again. In a statement released by the team, she said, “I’m beyond grateful for the opportunity to join the Atlanta Dream organization”

Article Title: Why was Alberto Del Rio arrested? Former WWE superstar detained in Mexico
Article Text:
Alberto Del Rio. Image via: Joe Scarnici/ Getty Images

Why was Alberto Del Rio arrested?



Alberto Del Rio's arrest became a trending subject of discussion after reports confirmed the former WWE champion had been taken into custody in Mexico. The incident occurred with early details pointing to a domestic dispute that escalated into police intervention.Authorities in San Luis Potosí responded to an emergency call. Upon arrival at the scene, the incident prompted immediate action. The situation remains under investigation, but the seriousness of the allegations has already drawn widespread attention.Alberto Del Rio, whose real name is José Alberto Rodríguez Chucuan, was detained on April 6 in the Lomas del Tec area of San Luis Potosí. According to multiple reports, the arrest followed a 911 call made by his wife. She alleged Del Rio had committed physical and verbal assault.When State Civil Guard officers arrived, they reportedly found signs of injury, including marks on her face and arms. The timing of their arrival proved critical. Reports suggest they reached the scene while the alleged assault was still taking place, which led to Del Rio being taken into custody on the spot.He has since been placed under the jurisdiction of the Attorney General’s Office in the state, where the case is now being reviewed.As of now, authorities have not released a detailed statement outlining formal charges. The investigation is active.Images and video circulating online appear to show Del Rio in custody. Regardless, the situation is being treated seriously. More updates expected as legal proceedings move forward.This is not the first time Del Rio has faced legal scrutiny. In 2020, he was arrested in Texas on charges that included aggravated kidnapping and assault. Those charges were later dropped in 2021 when a key witness failed to appear in court. Del Rio has maintained that the accusations were part of an attempted extortion.WWE had no interest in Alberto Del RioEven before this latest development, Del Rio’s relationship with WWE had already cooled. Despite reports that he was part of the broader talent pool following WWE’s acquisition of AAA, he never returned to television or played a role in the company’s plans.That absence was telling. For a performer who once made history by winning both the WWE Championship and World Heavyweight Championship, along with the Royal Rumble and Money in the Bank in the same year, his career arc has shifted sharply.His exit from AAA followed soon after the acquisition, ending a run where he remained one of the promotion’s most recognizable names. Since then, he has continued to work in smaller promotions, staying active but far removed from the global spotlight he once commanded.Now, the focus is no longer on titles or comebacks. It is on the legal process ahead and the outcome of an investigation that could shape what comes next, both inside and outside the ring.
Article Summary: Alberto Del Rio was arrested on April 6 in San Luis Potosí, Mexico. The former WWE champion was taken into custody after a domestic dispute. His wife reportedly made a 911 call saying he had assaulted her. Authorities arrived at the scene while the alleged assault was taking place.

Article Title: WWE RAW Results & Highlights 6-april-2026: Brock Lesnar & Oba Femi brawl, CM Punk appears and more
Article Text:
Image via WWE

What happened in the opening segment of WWE RAW this week?



Austin Theory vs. LA Knight

Finn Balor vs. JD McDonagh

Bayley vs. Lash Legend

Penta, Je’Von Evans & Dragon Lee vs. El Grande, Rayo & Bravo Americano

Rhea Ripley & IYO Sky vs. Michin & B-Fab

Brock Lesnar & Oba Femi contract signing

WWE RAW presented its April 6 episode from the Toyota Center in Houston, Texas. The show featured some explosive in-ring action and appearances by top stars, including CM Punk and Seth Rollins. The night ended on a chaotic note as Brock Lesnar and Oba Femi brawled during their contract signing segment that was overseen by Triple H.CM Punk opened the show, despite being advertised for later that night. The Best in the World spoke about Houston as a wrestling town and then addressed the events of his feud with Roman Reigns from the last few weeks. He even addressed The Usos siding with him and Reigns not being presented at RAW this week. Punk got out of the ring and onto the announcer's desk to hype the audience for WrestleMania 42.This was a singles match between LA Knight and Austin Theory, who had Logan Paul in his corner. The exciting match was fast-paced until the final moments, when Paul provided a distraction long enough for Theory to roll up Knight and grab the tights to secure the three count.The former mentor-protege duo of Finn Balor and JD McDonagh were set to collide in a singles bout.However, Dominik Mysterio attacked Balor before the bout started, and he and McDonagh together took him out, ending the match in a No Contest.Both Bayley and Lash Legend were accompanied by their respective partners, Lyra Valkyria and Nia Jax. The match also saw the interference of Charlotte Flair and Alexa Bliss. In the end, Valkyria provided a small assist that allowed Bayley to pick up the win over Legend.This was a six-man tag team match between both sides. It was one of the most enthralling bouts of the night that saw high-flying and fast-moving action. The bout ended with Je’Vons Evans hitting the OG Cutter on Bravo Americano to pick up the win for his team.The two sides collided in a tag team match with Jade Cargill at ringside. The match was a great addition to the card. It came to an end when IYO Sky rolled up B-Fab for the win. Following that, Michin and B-Fab held Rhea Ripley as she had to watch Cargill attack SKY with a kendo stick.Triple H came out to watch over the WrestleMania 42 contract signing between Brock Lesnar and Oba Femi. However, it ended with a huge brawl between both men at ringside as security tried to separate them to close the show.Also read: Why was Alberto Del Rio arrested? Former WWE superstar detained in Mexico
Article Summary: WWE RAW presented its April 6 episode from the Toyota Center in Houston, Texas. The show featured some explosive in-ring action and appearances by top stars. The night ended on a chaotic note as Brock Lesnar and Oba Femi brawled during their contract signing segment.

Article Title: Houston Texans: NFL Trade Rumors: Houston Texans eye $5M former Cleveland Browns star CB after brutal setback last season
Article Text:
Houston Texans eye $5M former Cleveland Browns star CB after brutal setback last season.(Image via NFL.com)

Houston Texans target former Cleveland Browns ’ star cornerback , Martin Emerson Jr. , after a strong season



The Houston Texans had a rocky start in the last season but recorded a pretty strong performance later as it ended the season with 12 wins and just 5 losses.The 2025 season marked one of the most successful seasons in the history of the Houston Texans but the team witnessed a brutal loss to the New England Patriots in the Divisional Round. Ahead of the new season, it seems the team is fully focused on working on their roster.A few hours ago, popular NFL insider Ian Rapoport of NFL Network made a post on X which read as, “Former Browns starting CB Martin Emerson Jr, who missed last season after tearing his Achilles, is on a visit with the Texans, source said…”Ian Rapoport of NFL Network added, “Emerson was heading into a contract year after starting 27 games for Cleveland before his injury. Now a potential addition in Houston.”While this has sparked a debate among fans, neither the Houston Texans nor the former Cleveland Browns’ star player, Martin Emerson Jr. has reacted to the speculations yet.The 25 year old cornerback, Martin Emerson Jr., has experienced a few tough moments on the field in the last few seasons.Back in the 2023 season, Martin Emerson Jr. recorded an impressive performance as he finished the season with 59 combined tackles (45 solo), 14 pass deflections, and four interceptions in 16 games and 12 starts.But in 2024, his performance saw a sharp decline with 82 combined tackles (62 solo) as he had five pass deflections with 15 starts.As per Pro Football Focus, Martin Emerson Jr.’s overall grade fell from 65.3 in 2023 to 47.9 in 2024.To make matters worse, the former Cleveland Browns’ star player, Martin Emerson Jr., ended up missing the 2025 season as he sustained a brutal ACL tear during training camp in July 2025.A few months ago, Martin Emerson Jr. reflected on his performances in the last few seasons as he said, “I feel like there’s a lot more in the tank, honestly,” he said. “I feel like I haven’t reached my full potential. It’s a year. It was a lot of growing pains, a lot of learning, a lot of lessons.”The popular cornerback added, “And it’s kind of hard when you’re in the fire, all you see is the smoke.”For now, all eyes are on where Martin Emerson Jr. ends up next as he battles through a tough time.
Article Summary: Houston Texans target former Cleveland Browns ’ star cornerback, Martin Emerson Jr. The 25 year old cornerback has experienced a few tough moments on the field in the last few seasons. He sustained a brutal ACL tear during training camp in July 2025.

Article Title: Today IPL match, SRH vs LSG: Team prediction, head-to-head, pitch report, weather update
Article Text:
SRH vs LSG (Agency Image)

Watch Shashank Singh on Punjab’s strong start, Priyansh’s growth & team mentality | IPL 2026 Shashank Singh on Punjab’s strong start, Priyansh’s growth & team mentality | IPL 2026

Pitch Report

Head-to-Head

Team News & Tactics

Sunrisers Hyderabad

Lucknow Super Giants

Probable XIs

Sunrisers Hyderabad:

Lucknow Super Giants:

Key Stats

Sunrisers Hyderabad and Lucknow Super Giants head into their IPL 2026 clash in Hyderabad still searching for early momentum, though their journeys so far have unfolded quite differently. While SRH have already experienced both defeat and victory, LSG arrive with more uncertainty after an underwhelming start. For both teams, this fixture is as much about locking in combinations as it is about gaining early points.SRH looked far more settled in their last outing against Kolkata Knight Riders, particularly with the bat. Despite crossing 200 in both matches this season, their approach appeared more structured the second time around, with the openers laying a solid base for the middle order to build on. Their bowling unit, which had struggled earlier, also showed better control across phases. Returning to home conditions, SRH will look to sustain that momentum while tightening their execution with the ball.LSG, meanwhile, have more fundamental issues to address. Their loss to Delhi Capitals exposed flaws in both planning and execution. The decision to push Rishabh Pant up the order disrupted the batting flow without producing results, leaving the middle order under pressure.A total of 141 offered little cushion for the bowlers, who couldn’t maintain enough scoreboard pressure despite brief control. The team now faces a key decision on whether to persist with the current approach or return to a more balanced batting order.The match will be played on Sunday, April 5 at the Rajiv Gandhi International Cricket Stadium, a venue known for producing high-scoring games in recent seasons. SRH’s aggressive batting style has thrived here, often leading to big totals, although recent domestic matches have also seen more moderate scores. Weather could be a factor too, with a yellow alert issued across Telangana and thunderstorms forecast in the coming days.The surface in Hyderabad is expected to assist fast bowlers early on, but it typically becomes easier for batting as the game progresses. With a quick outfield and shorter boundaries, stroke play is likely to dominate once batters get set. Another run-heavy contest could be on the cards, with teams chasing possibly targeting totals in the 220–230 range.Conditions in Hyderabad are expected to remain clear during the match, with temperatures around 34°C and humidity near 24 percent, making for a hot but uninterrupted game.These sides have met six times in the IPL so far, with LSG holding the edge with four wins, while SRH have won twice.SRH could be boosted by the return of Brydon Carse, who has missed the opening games due to a hand injury. If declared fit, he is likely to come in for David Payne, while Pat Cummins is still expected to be unavailable.From a tactical standpoint, SRH may consider recalling Harshal Patel, given his strong record against both Pant and Aiden Markram, along with his success at this venue.LSG do not have injury concerns but face key strategic calls. Pant’s promotion up the order was largely driven by match-up considerations, especially against left-arm spin. With SRH likely to field similar options, that move could continue, although Pant himself has described it as a “50-50 call”.Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan (c & wk), Heinrich Klaasen, Aniket Verma, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Salil Arora, Harsh Dubey, Shivang Kumar / Harshal Patel, Jaydev Unadkat, Brydon Carse / David Payne, Eshan MalingaMitchell Marsh, Rishabh Pant (c & wk), Aiden Markram, Ayush Badoni, Nicholas Pooran, Abdul Samad, Mukul Choudhary, Digvesh Rathi, Mohammed Shami, Anrich Nortje, Mohsin Khan, Prince YadavSince 2024, SRH have been extremely dominant when posting 200-plus totals, winning eight such matches with a success rate close to 89 percent. Meanwhile, Abhishek Sharma has been particularly prolific in Hyderabad, scoring heavily at a striking rate in T20s at the venue.For LSG, the Marsh-Markram opening pair was among the most productive last season, though Pant’s record as an opener across formats remains modest, with limited returns so far.With both teams still searching for the right combinations, this contest could offer clearer direction for their campaigns in IPL 2026.
Article Summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad and Lucknow Super Giants meet in IPL 2026. Both teams are searching for early momentum after disappointing starts. SRH could be boosted by the return of Brydon Carse, who has missed the opening games due to a hand injury.

Article Title: IPL match today, CSK vs RCB: Team prediction, head-to-head, pitch report, Bengaluru weather update
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

CSK vs RCB : Head-to-head



Watch Stephen Fleming on CSK’s revamp, bowling pressure & impact player rule Stephen Fleming on CSK’s revamp, bowling pressure & impact player rule

The much-anticipated southern derby is here, with the M Chinnaswamy Stadium set to host an exciting clash between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Chennai Super Kings on Sunday.RCB head into the contest after a dominant start to their title defence, highlighted by a stunning chase of 202 inside 16 overs against Sunrisers Hyderabad.CSK, meanwhile, arrive under immense pressure. They have played two matches so far and lost both, and will be desperate to secure their first win of the season.Matches played: 36CSK wins: 22RCB wins: 13No result: 1In 36 meetings between the two sides, Chennai Super Kings have won 22 matches, while Royal Challengers Bengaluru have managed 13 victories, with one game ending in no result. The figures highlight CSK’s historical dominance in this southern derby.No rain is expected and a full match is on the cards at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium. The weather in Bengaluru on April 5 is likely to be clear, providing pleasant conditions for cricket.Fans can expect an uninterrupted game, with temperatures around 28°C in the evening. The match, scheduled to begin at 7:30 PM, is set to be played without any rain interruptions.Short boundaries and a quick outfield at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru favour the batters.While it’s a great venue for stroke play, teams will need to post big totals as defending scores here can be challenging due to the small dimensions. The highest team total at this ground is 287/3, registered by Sunrisers Hyderabad.Royal Challengers Bengaluru: Rajat Patidar (c), Tim David, Virat Kohli, Devdutt Padikkal, Philip Salt, Jitesh Sharma, Jacob Bethell, Krunal Pandya, Romario Shepherd, Abhinandan Singh, Josh Hazlewood, Rasikh Salam Dar, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Suyash Sharma, Swapnil Singh, Nuwan Thushara, Venkatesh Iyer, Jacob Duffy, Jordan Cox, Vicky Ostwal, Vihaan Malhotra, Kanishk Chouhan, Mangesh Yadav, Satvik DeswalChennai Super Kings: Sanju Samson (wk), Ayush Mhatre, Ruturaj Gaikwad (c), Urvil Patel, Matthew Short, Shivam Dube, Jamie Overton, Noor Ahmad, Khaleel Ahmed, Matt Henry, Anshul Kamboj, Akeal Hosein, Sarfaraz Khan, MS Dhoni, Dewald Brevis, Shreyas Gopal, Rahul Chahar, Spencer Johnson, Mukesh Choudhary, Aman Khan, Gurjapneet Singh, Zakary Foulkes, Ramakrishna Ghosh, Kartik Sharma, Prashant VeerRoyal Challengers Bengaluru: Virat Kohli, Philip Salt, Rajat Patidar(c), Jitesh Sharma(w), Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Krunal Pandya, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Abhinandan Singh, Jacob Duffy, Suyash SharmaChennai Super Kings (Playing XI): Sanju Samson(w), Ruturaj Gaikwad(c), Ayush Mhatre, Sarfaraz Khan, Shivam Dube, Kartik Sharma, Prashant Veer, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Matt Henry, Khaleel Ahmed

Article Title: “I have control issues": Jason Kelce's wife Kylie Kelce breaks silence on her drinking habits with honest confession
Article Text:
Kylie Kelce revealed she avoids alcohol due to her need for control, saying she dislikes feeling out of control and rarely drinks. She also shared she has never smoked. The candid admission came during her podcast, where she emphasized personal comfort and boundaries while also addressing growing public curiosity around her family life.

Kylie Kelce keeps it real about control, choices, and constant questions

There is something refreshing about honesty, especially when it comes without polish. Kylie Kelce did exactly that when she spoke about her personal habits, offering a glimpse into how she navigates control, comfort, and everyday choices. It was not dramatic. It was real. And that is what made it stand out.Living in the public eye alongside Jason Kelce, Kylie has never tried to fit into expectations. She keeps things simple, especially when it comes to her family and her own boundaries. This time, she opened up about why alcohol has never really been part of her life, and the reason was as straightforward as it gets.On her podcast, Kylie Kelce did not overthink her answer. “I have control issues,” she joked while speaking with Caleb Hearon. “I don't ever want to be out of control. I don't really drink alcohol very much.”She followed that up with a thought that felt even more personal. “I can control not having to feel that way. I've never smoked anything in my whole life,” she added. It was not about trends or image. It was about knowing what works for her and sticking to it.That sense of control has clearly shaped how she lives. Even when she talks about her early days with Jason, there is a lightness to it.She once shared that their first meeting ended with him falling asleep at a bar, a small but telling contrast to her own habits.But it is not just her lifestyle choices that people keep asking about. Questions around Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift have followed her everywhere, especially talk about their wedding. This time, Kylie did not hold back.“I just wanna say to literally everybody--I know it usually comes from a good place, not always--but quit asking me and my mother-in-law about upcoming nuptials,” she said. “Nobody’s f***ing telling you anything!”Then came the line that summed up her frustration with humor and edge. “That’s private information… So A and B, C your way out. Keep f***ing asking. You know what my answer’s gonna be? ‘I know nothing, suck my ass,’” she joked.It was blunt. Maybe a little shocking. But it was honest. And in a space where people often expect access to everything, Kylie Kelce made one thing clear. Some parts of life are not up for discussion.
Article Summary: Kylie Kelce revealed she avoids alcohol due to her need for control, saying she dislikes feeling out of control and rarely drinks. She also shared she has never smoked. The candid admission came during her podcast, where she emphasized personal comfort and boundaries.

Article Title: Iga Swiatek: Iga Swiatek spotted with family in Mallorca as Rafael Nadal training quietly builds intrigue before clay season
Article Text:
Iga Swiatek (Image Via Getty)

Iga Swiatek spends Easter with family in Mallorca while preparing for clay season with Rafael Nadal guidance

Iga Swiatek gave fans a calm and personal update just before her clay season begins. The former World No. 1 spent her Easter break in Mallorca with her father Tomasz Swiatek and her sister, sharing a rare family moment away from the tour. At a time when her form and ranking have been under focus, this small glimpse into her life felt different and more grounded.The timing also matters. Swiatek is coming off a tough run at Indian Wells and Miami, where she could not go deep. Her ranking has slipped to No. 4, and there is pressure building ahead of the clay season. So, this short break with family looks like a reset before things get serious again.In the photos shared on social media, Iga Swiatek looked relaxed and happy. She was seen playing paddle in Mallorca, wearing a green cap and a white t-shirt. Her father Tomasz, who once competed as an Olympic rower, stood beside her, while her sister also joined the moment. Her coach Maciek was there too, posing casually with them.It was not just a holiday mood. There is a clear shift in her preparation as well. Swiatek has been spending time at Rafael Nadal’s academy, training on clay and learning closely from someone she has always looked up to.Speaking about this experience to Sport.pl, she said, “You know, Rafa is my idol and basically the only person I watched play tennis as a child. He was also kind enough to talk to me several times during his career and give me tips.”She kept things respectful but also private, adding that she prefers not to share details of those conversations.Along with that, Swiatek has started working with Francisco Roig, who was part of Rafael Nadal’s coaching team for many years. This move has already caught attention in the tennis world, with players and experts seeing it as a strong step before the clay season.There is also more context behind this phase. Swiatek was once holding the top ranking for a long time, but things have changed since the 2023 US Open. Players like Aryna Sabalenka, Elena Rybakina, and Coco Gauff have pushed ahead, making the competition tighter.Still, clay remains her strongest surface. With multiple titles at Roland Garros, she knows how to perform here. Now, with a fresh team setup, time with family, and guidance from Rafael Nadal, she is quietly building towards a comeback.The next big step will be the Stuttgart Open starting April 13. That is where fans will get the first real look at where her game stands.
Article Summary: Iga Swiatek spends Easter with family in Mallorca while preparing for clay season. Former World No. 1 has been spending time at Rafael Nadal’s academy, training on clay and learning closely from someone she has always looked up to. The next big step will be the Stuttgart Open starting April 13.

Article Title: Andrey Rublev: Andrey Rublev’s honest painkiller comment after MTO incident leaves fresh concerns in Monte Carlo opener
Article Text:
Andrey Rublev (Image Via Getty)

Andrey Rublev fights through pain to beat Nuno Borges but raises injury concerns

Andrey Rublev’s opening match at the Monte-Carlo Masters did not go as smoothly as the scoreline might suggest. The former champion struggled with a shoulder issue early in the match but still managed to push through and secure a hard-fought win over Nuno Borges. What stood out more than the result was Rublev’s honest reaction after the match.The Russian player later admitted that the pain was serious enough for him to consider stopping mid-match. Instead, he chose to continue, relying on treatment and painkillers to stay in the contest. His comments have now raised questions about his fitness going deeper into the tournament.The match started with Andrey Rublev looking slightly uncomfortable. Around the middle of the first set, he began to feel pain in his shoulder while serving. Soon after, he took a medical timeout off the court to deal with the issue.Despite the discomfort, Rublev returned and managed to take the first set 6-4. However, things quickly changed in the second set. His movement and timing dropped, and Nuno Borges took advantage, winning it 6-1.At that point, it looked like Rublev might not be able to continue. But he stayed calm and focused on finishing the match. In the deciding set, he suddenly found his rhythm again and closed it out 6-1. Speaking after the match, Rublev openly shared what was going through his mind. He said,“Obviously, I think today was exactly a mental victory for me, because in one moment, I thought, okay, it’s done.And then I was able to kind of, okay, let’s just accept it, let’s just kind of trust.”He added, “In the end, somehow, out of nowhere, I start to feel better. I was able to fight again, to play better, and in the end, I was able to win a match.”Rublev also explained when the pain actually began. He said, “When I came back from the changeover at 4-3, when I went for a serve, I start to feel it a little bit. After the first serve that I did, I start to feel it much more.”Then came the moment that caught everyone’s attention. Talking about how he managed the pain, he said with a laugh, “The body feeling? I don’t know, because I took a horse dose of painkillers and a medical timeout.”Now, there is uncertainty about his next match against Zizou Bergs. Rublev himself admitted he is not sure how his body will react in the coming hours.This is not the first time Rublev has done well in Monte-Carlo. He won the title here in 2023 and has had strong runs in past years. But right now, his main challenge is not his opponent, it is his own fitness.
Article Summary: Andrey Rublev beat Nuno Borges 6-4, 6-1 in his opening match at the Monte-Carlo Masters. The former champion struggled with a shoulder issue early in the match but still managed to push through and secure a hard-fought win. After the match, Rublev admitted that the pain was serious enough for him to consider stopping mid-match.

Article Text:

No Carolina tight end has recorded at least 500 yards after Greg Olsen

Cleveland tight end may sign for much less than predicted by Spotrac

Cleveland Browns tight end David Njoku’s 2025 season was marred by injuries. Rookie Harold Fannin Jr. took his spot for rookie quarterback Shedeur Sanders. However, CBS Sports’ Garrett Podell reports that when Njoku is healthy, he is a valuable middle-of-the-field and red-zone playmaker. That’s exactly where the Carolina Panthers need help.The Browns’ TE could really utilize the middle of the field for young quarterback Bryce Young. Podell reports that Carolina needs more receiving threat than Tommy Tremble has shown on tape. Tremble amassed 27 receptions for 249 yards and two touchdowns in 17 games.PFSN analyst T.J. Randall projects the Panthers to pick Oregon Ducks TE, Kenyon Sadiq. In 2025, Sadiq recorded 51 catches for 560 yards and eight touchdowns. The 6-foot-3, 241-pounder could be the rookie TE, and Njoku could be the veteran presence for him [speculation].As opposed to Tremble, Njoku’s 2025 stats were: 33 receptions for 293 yards and four touchdowns in just 12 games. In 2024: 64 receptions for 505 yards and five touchdowns in just 11 games. When remarkably healthy and durable in 2023: 81 receptions for 882 yards and six touchdowns in 16 games.ESPN’s Bill Barnwell reported that injuries took up Njoku’s playing time in 2024 and 2025.A knee injury kept him away for 10 games. His route efficiency was severely affected: after averaging 11.3 yards per catch during his three-year peak, he fell to 8.2 yards per catch over the past two seasons.From 22 catches, he came down to just five in 2024 and 2025. In the past five seasons, he also recorded the highest drop rate among TEs in the NFL [200 targets]. This could be because of the Browns’ inconsistent quarterback situation. There has been no consistent signal-caller in Cleveland.Anyhow, Barnwell picked Baltimore for Njoku, but they signed veteran tight end Durham Smythe to take up Charlie Kolar’s spot. Isaiah Likely’s spot is still open. Kolar may take that spot. They are also linked to drafting Kenyon Sadiq, the same Oregon TE with whom the Panthers are linked.If that doesn’t happen, then maybe they could sign a budget-friendly veteran behind Mark Andrews. That budget-friendly veteran could be Njoku? Anyhow, coming back to Carolina.Panthers Wire’s Anthony Rizzuti suggests that even though Carolina seems comfortable with their current TE room, it could use an upgrade in their production department.Since 2019, they have not had a single TE to record at least 500 receiving yards in a season. Greg Olson was the last one to do that. And now, Olsen’s a lead television sports commentator and analyst for FOX Sports.Anyhow, David Njoku had two down years, but even in one of those, he recorded 64 receptions for 505 yards and five touchdowns in 11 games. When he is healthy, his average receiving yards is typically well above 500.As per Spotrac, the 29-year-old Miami alum is projected to sign a two-year, $19 million contract, which gives him a $10 million average annual income. According to Over The Cap, Carolina has a $2.2 million in cap space.The CBS Sports analyst reports that Njoku will turn 30 in 2026 and has been dealing with injuries, so both entities could make him a “cost-conscious target.”Sports Illustrated’s Zach Roberts reports that Spotrac’s prediction was at the beginning of free agency; now the market has cooled off, so the veteran could sign for much less than what was predicted for him.So, would the Panthers consider a Cleveland tight end? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Cleveland Browns tight end David Njoku’s 2025 season was marred by injuries. The 29-year-old Miami alum is projected to sign a two-year, $19 million contract, which gives him a $10 million average annual income. No Carolina tight end has recorded at least 500 yards after Greg Olsen.

Article Title: Jake Denni: Andretti’s Jake Dennis and fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey enjoy seaside breakfast date during Easter getaway in France
Article Text:
Jake Dennis and fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey went on a special date in France. (Image credit: Instagram)

Inside Jake Dennis and Lexi Grace Boosey’s stunning sea-view breakfast date



Jake Dennis and Lexi Grace Boosey dine at a sea-facing restaurant in France. (Image credit: Instagram)

Jake Dennis' pet Billy

All about Jake Dennis’ love life and performance in Formula E



Andretti driver Jake Dennis is currently spending quality time with fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey in France. The couple rang in the Easter weekend there and shared scenic glimpses of their breakfast date overlooking the sea. They were also accompanied by their dog, Billy, whom they treated to special delicacies and new toys for Easter. Dennis has some time off to spend with his loved ones, as Formula E is on a month-long break before returning for the Berlin E-Prix next month.Taking to Instagram Stories recently, Jake Dennis and Lexi Grace Boosey shared mesmerising views from their breakfast date in France. They dined in an open setting at an ocean-facing restaurant at The Maybourne Riviera and gave fans a glimpse of the stunning surroundings.Boosey shared a clip of Dennis soaking in the view, looking out over the blue Mediterranean Sea and the landscape below from a glass terrace. She also posted glimpses of the burgers, sausages and other dishes they enjoyed. Another picture highlighted a massive floral arrangement at the restaurant.Jake Dennis, 30, got engaged to his long-time girlfriend Lexi Grace Boosey in December last year. He proposed just days after winning the first race of the season in Sao Paulo.The couple have been working on setting up their new home in Spain over the past few weeks.After winning Round 1 in Sao Paulo and finishing fifth in Round 2 in Mexico City, Dennis experienced a dip in form in the following races. He finished sixth in the most recent round, the Madrid E-Prix.Reflecting on the result, the Andretti driver wrote on Instagram: “6th in Madrid. A messy weekend with a mix of all conditions, but we came home with some points. Not where we want to be as a team just yet, so some homework to do! Overall, what a great event it was for FE - first time at Jarama. Awesome track and a fully sold-out event!”Dennis is currently eighth in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 47 points. He is just two points behind Season 11 world champion Oliver Rowland in the standings.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Andretti driver Jake Dennis is currently spending time with fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey in France. The couple shared scenic glimpses of their breakfast date overlooking the sea. They were also accompanied by their dog, Billy, whom they treated to special delicacies and new toys for Easter.

Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 update timeline



When does Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 end?



The next Fortnite update, v40.20, is going to be released on April 16, 2026, and the upcoming patch will be the second major mid-season update for Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown. Like previous updates for the game, servers will go offline shortly before the scheduled downtime begins. Given that this is a minor patch, the downtime will only last for a period of approximately 90 minutes.During the maintenance window, you will not be able to play the game’s different modes, and you will have to wait for the break to end.You can expect the new v40.20 patch to come with balance adjustments, exciting new collaborations, and story progressions.Given that Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown focuses on the conflict between the returning Ice King and The Foundation, you can anticipate the update to expand that narrative while refining the current loot pool. Article Title: George Kittle: George Kittle’s San Francisco 49ers strongly linked to $5M Dallas Cowboys edge defender
Article Text:
George Kittle’s San Francisco 49ers strongly linked to $5M Dallas Cowboys edge defender (Image via Getty: George Kittle and Dallas Cowboys logo)

NFL Trade Rumors: George Kittle ’s 49ers picked for Cowboys edge Jadeveon Clowney

Niners DC Raheem Morris may look for someone like Jadeveon Clowney

Dallas defensive end wants reunion with Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson

Sometimes comparisons work wonders. San Francisco 49ers defensive end Nick Bosa earned an 86.3 overall PFF grade, ranking 0th among 115 qualified edge defenders. Niners edge rusher Mykel Williams secured a 53.9 overall PFF grade, ranking 101st among others.As for Dallas Cowboys edge defender Jadeveon Clowney, he earned a 79.2 overall PFF grade, ranking 18th among others. No wonder CBS Sports’ Garrett Podell picked Clowney for San Francisco.The Niners have called back Bosa and Williams for 2026 but adding a “healthy and proven push rush threat” could relieve stress off their primary edges’ shoulders. Both of them ended their seasons early because of torn ACLs.Plus, Bryce Huff announced early retirement on March 12. He is only 27. And he had recorded 17 solo tackles, 11 assists, 5.0 sacks, and two forced fumbles. PFF gave him a 69.2 overall grade, which ranks him 46th among others. But he’s no longer playing for the league. So, there’s a spot open for Clowney.Among other reasons, the 49ers ranked last in the league in team sacks for the 2025 season. They recorded 1.18 sacks per game, the lowest among postseason teams. Clowney could give them all they need to overturn their 2025 season scoring.The Cowboys DE amassed unbelievable stats last year alone: 41 total tackles [24 solo], 12 tackles for loss, 8.5 sacks, 10 QB hits, four passes defended, two fumble recoveries, and one forced fumble all in just 13 games. His PFF pass rush grade was 80.6, and his PFF run defense grade was 70.6.Sports Illustrated’s Tom Jensen had already predicted Clowney for Raheem Morris’ franchise in February.The Niners have hired the Atlanta Falcons’ head coach, Raheem Morris, as their new defensive coordinator. His former team secured 57 total sacks last season. He’s entering a team that recorded just 20 sacks last season. The coach may be looking for a veteran and healthy edge defender who can turn this record around in his new franchise.Morris primarily uses a 3-4 scheme, while the Niners have stuck with a 4-3. This should not be a problem for the 33-year-old OLB because he has experience playing in both defensive schemes.The Niners also signed Denver Broncos linebacker Dre Greenlaw in this free agency [San Francisco is Greenlaw’s parent franchise]. His re-signing could signal that the franchise is looking to revamp the season. So maybe things will work out for Clowney in San Francisco.CBS Sports analyst did pick Dallas DE for the Niners, but what if he had already chosen a team for himself?Pro Football Rumors’ Connor Byrne reports that if the veteran edge rusher signs elsewhere, it could be his 8th team out of his 13 NFL seasons. In 2023, he played for the Baltimore Ravens, led by Lamar Jackson. He recorded a career-high 9.5 sacks that year.The veteran told KPRC 2’s Aaron Wilson recently, “They got a lot of good guys that I can relate to in that locker room. I’ll definitely be open to going back to Baltimore, playing with Lamar Jackson now. It was a great time for me.”Jackson even replied on X: “Definitely.” The star QB had also expressed excitement over Maxx Crosby ’s signing by sharing Denzel Washington’s boom meme. Though it did not come to any fruition.Anyhow, PFSN’s Alex Kennedy projects a one-year, $6.1 million contract for Clowney. As per Spotrac’s calculated market value, the veteran is expected to sign a one-year, $5.7 million contract, giving him an average annual income of $5.7 million.So, will it be the Ravens or the Niners who acquire the Dallas edge defender? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Dallas defensive end wants reunion with Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson in 2023. San Francisco 49ers defensive end Nick Bosa earned an 86.3 overall PFF grade, ranking 0th among 115 qualified edge defenders. Dallas Cowboys edge defender Jadeveon Clowney, he earned a 79.2 overall P FF grade,. ranking 18th among others.

Article Title: Formula E: Big Time explains Formula E energy management perfectly, fans say “send it to F1 drivers”
Article Text:
Formula E (Image credit: Formula E)

Here’s how energy management is mastered in Formula E



Watch Something Weird is Happening with Electric Race Cars: Coding the Chaos Ep.1 Something Weird is Happening with Electric Race Cars: Coding the Chaos Ep.1

Formula E fans react to first episode of Coding the Chaos

Formula E is currently in its twelfth season, having successfully delivered a sustainable form of motor racing entertainment for fans. The championship has gained even more popularity since Formula One introduced hybrid powertrains this season, which have left many seasoned F1 drivers nervous and frustrated, turning the pinnacle of motorsport into what some see as a strange experiment. Now, Big Time’s Jeremiah Burton has hosted a six-episode series to educate fans on the concept of energy management in Formula E races, with inputs from drivers like Jake Dennis, Lucas di Grassi and Zane Maloney.The Big Time video of Episode 1 - Coding the Chaos - was shared by Formula E on social media. In the first episode, Burton breaks down energy management in the simplest way possible, helping fans understand one of the most crucial aspects of the sport.This is the first episode of a six-part series exploring the engineering behind Formula E. The video highlights how energy management during a race is not just about the driver’s racing skills, but also about the entire team’s strategy, which ultimately decides the result.Adding his insight, Sao Paulo E-Prix winner Jake Dennis explains in the video, “I just love the unknown of Formula E. I think that’s what is great about it.You can basically lead the whole race, think you are doing a great job, but then in the last two laps, you can run out of energy and end up finishing sixth or seventh.”Lucas di Grassi also adds, “People have to understand we are pushing 100 percent all the time. It’s just that what changes is sometimes you are allowed to use more or less energy to gain or defend a position, which means you are driving fast but also efficiently. And if you do that, for sure, you are going to have a good result in the race.”Fans loved the way Jeremiah Burton explained the concept of energy management. Reacting to the video, one fan commented on YouTube: “Someone should send this video to the Formula 1 drivers, it may help them out.”Another said: “I’ve been watching F1 for over 40 years now, but this year it has changed so much. I’ll start watching Formula E as well, it should help me understand what F1 is trying to do.” One more added: “One of the best things about racing is the tech and driver skill. It is crazy to see how far the teams in Formula E take all those factors! Love it.” Another comment read: “The best part is that drivers and teams do not always know exactly how much battery they have. The fact that there is a lot less data makes for quite exciting races.”Formula E will return with Round 7 of Season 12 in Berlin. The Berlin E-Prix is scheduled from 1-3 May.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”
Article Summary: Formula E is currently in its twelfth season. Big Time’s Jeremiah Burton has hosted a six-episode series to educate fans on the concept of energy management in Formula E races. The Big Time video of Episode 1 - Coding the Chaos - was shared by Formula E on social media.

Article Title: Boston Bruins News: "It was completely my fault'' Boston Bruins forward Morgan Geekie explains rare NHL penalty mistake following overtime loss to Philadelphia Flyers
Article Text:
Morgan Geekie of the Boston Bruins celebrates his goal with teammates during the third period against the Los Angeles Kings (Credit: Getty Images)

Morgan Geekie explains equipment penalty during Boston Bruins and Philadelphia Flyers NHL game



The Bruins suffered another blow as they lost to the Philadelphia Flyers 2-1 in overtime, yet the media soon focused its attention on an unusual and unforeseen incident involving a forward, Morgan Geekie. The Bruins top goal scorer was in a very peculiar position as he was punished due to throwing equipment, which is a violation of the rule that surprised many people during the game.Geekie, who has not been scoring the back of the net in the recent games, confronted the incident in the post-game and did not hesitate to own up to the incident. The incident that caused the play to unfold occurred as he tried to pass a stick to one of his teammates, Charlie McAvoy, but lost control and a penalty was called.After the game, Morgan Geekie said it was an accident and that he only wanted to pass the stick to a colleague. Rather, an accident caused the equipment to be thrown accidentally, and this resulted in a minor fine. He admitted the error and took complete responsibility, saying it was not a particular thing that he wanted to do in a crucial phase of the game.The incident was not unique on its own, but also because of the peculiarities of the manner in which it was developing on the ice.Although these punishments are not frequent, they indicate that even the slightest mistake can affect the game at the very top of the National Hockey League. Geekie acknowledged that he had experienced a similar case in his professional life before, but he thought that this was accidental and not the same as before.To Bruins, the delay was another addition to an already tough period, as the club struggles to make ends meet in a competitive season. The honesty that Geekie displayed on the post-game gave an indication that he understood the significance of discipline, particularly in tight matches where even the slightest error can change the flow of the game.Both the team and Geekie will be looking forward to forgetting the incident and focusing on future games as Boston goes on with its campaign.
Article Summary: Bruins forward Morgan Geekie was punished for throwing equipment. Geekie said it was an accident and that he only wanted to pass the stick to a colleague. The honesty that Geekie displayed on the post-game gave an indication that he understood the significance of discipline.

Article Title: Kyler Murray: Kyler Murray’s Minnesota Vikings connected to $27M New England Patriots wide receiver
Article Text:
Kyler Murray’s Minnesota Vikings connected to $27M New England Patriots wide receiver (Image via Getty: Minnesota Vikings logo and New England Patriots logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Kyler Murray’s Vikings tied to Patriots WR Stefon Diggs



Minnesota needs WR3 after Justin Jefferson and Jordan Addison

New England WR Stefon Diggs’ legal trouble since 2025 season

Can the Vikings accommodate their drafted player?

CBS Sports’ Garrett Podell released ideal landing spots for the top 10 remaining free agents. It had New England Patriots wide receiver Stefon Diggs for the Minnesota Vikings. The 32-year-old wideout is one of the few on the market probably because of his legal trouble. If his legal troubles are resolved, a homecoming in Minnesota could be expected. Kyler Murray , who was released from the Arizona Cardinals and signed on a one-year contract by the Vikings, may need high-caliber wideouts on the gridiron. Two are already there: Justin Jefferson and Jordan Addison. Diggs could be the third playmaker either for a new QB or J.J. McCarthy. Murray and McCarthy may compete for the starting role.Diggs was drafted by Minnesota in 2015 as the 146th overall pick in the fifth round. He played five seasons for them. He was traded to the Buffalo Bills in 2020. He played four seasons for Buffalo. Then a year for the Houston Texans. In 2025, he played for New England.Over 11 years, he has played with several quarterbacks: Teddy Bridgewater, Sam Bradford, Case Keenum, and Kirk Cousins in the Vikings. With Josh Allen in the Bills and CJ Stroud in the Texans. And then with Drake Maye in the Patriots.This time, if he returns to his parent franchise, he will play with 28-year-old Kyler Murray or 23-year-old J.J.McCarthy. Both the QBs missed games in 2025: McCarthy missed five, while Murray played only in five.The QB situation may not be as favorable as Diggs had in New England, but there is a coach [Kevin O’Connell] who wants to lead the team into the NFL playoffs after two postseason appearances in four seasons. And that’s where the veteran WR comes into the picture. He has had multiple postseason appearances [18 games, according to StatMuse].The wideout has not played under O’Connell, but his elite route-running, high football IQ, and ability to play with young quarterbacks and mentor younger players may align with O’Connell’s offense.Also, CBS Sports analyst reports that the WR3 spot is open after Jalen Nailor left for the Las Vegas Raiders in free agency. WR1 is 2022 NFL OPOY Justin Jefferson, and WR2 is former first-round pick Jordan Addison.Jefferson had 84 catches on 140 targets for 1,048 yards and two touchdowns. His overall PFF grade was 80.5, ranking 14th among 81 WRs in 2025.As for Addison, he amassed 42 receptions on 74 targets for 610 receiving yards and three touchdowns. His overall PFF grade was 64.9, which ranked him 60th among 81 qualified WRs. If Diggs comes back home, maybe he could take up the WR2 spot, and Addison could go for the WR3 spot [all speculation, based solely on 2025 stats].Anyhow, there could be a potential roadblock to Diggs’ homecoming: his legal battle.The 32-year-old wideout has pleaded not guilty to felony charges of strangulation or suffocation and misdemeanor charges of assault and battery following an alleged altercation with his personal chef at his Massachusetts home.His attorney denies the allegations, calling them a dispute over money. His attorney, Mitchell Schuster, claims his client is completely innocent. This legal trouble came in Dec. 2025. He played in the Super Bowl LX in Feb. 2026.Diggs was a crucial part of the 2025 AFC champions [New England Patriots]. His 2025 gridiron success is even talked about in the 2026 offseason: 85 receptions on 100 targets for 1,013 receiving yards and four touchdowns in 17 games. His PFF overall grade was 87.5, which ranked 6th among 81 qualified wide receivers.As per CBS Sports Research, Diggs’ 83.3% catch rate is the second-highest catch rate by a wide receiver in the past 45 seasons. The first highest is of former New Orleans Saints WR Michael Thomas, whose catch rate was 85% in 2018.According to Spotrac, the Maryland alum is projected to sign a two-year, $27M deal, giving him an average annual salary of $13.8M. According to Over The Cap, the Vikings have $4.8M in cap space.The team restructured wide receiver Justin Jefferson, left tackle Christian Darrisaw, and cornerback Bryon Murphy Jr.’s contracts to clear salary cap space for 2026. They may have about $12.5M in cap space after June 1.If his legal battle does not interfere and he remains available, the Vikings and the 32-year-old WR could agree to terms. Adam Thielen was welcomed back last year for a second stint; would Minnesota welcome Diggs too? Remains to be seen...
Article Summary: Diggs was drafted by Minnesota in 2015 as the 146th overall pick in the fifth round. The 32-year-old wideout has pleaded not guilty to felony charges of strangulation or suffocation and misdemeanor charges of assault and battery following an alleged altercation with his personal chef at his Massachusetts home. His attorney denies the allegations, calling them a dispute over money.

Article Title: Klay Thompson: Did Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson delete each other from social media amid breakup rumors?
Article Text:
Did Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson delete each other from social media amid breakup rumors?(Image via Getty Images)

Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson never added each other on their respective social media accounts

Megan Thee Stallion opened up about love and Klay Thompson

Megan Thee Stallion, the popular Grammy winner, and Klay Thompson seem to be pretty serious about their high profile relationship as they flaunt it to the world.Over the last few months, both of them have gifted expensive things to each other, including a Bentley gifted by Klay Thompson on Megan Thee Stallion’s birthday. Amid this, there have been constant rumours that the two have removed each other from their respective social media accounts.In the last few months, Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson have constantly dealt with such fake rumors about them removing one another on their respective social media accounts.Interestingly, though the two have been together for close to a year, Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson never added each other on social media.Though this has led to many break up rumors, both of them have stayed away from such speculations about their high profile relationship.While the reason behind this move is not known, both Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson continue to post their romantic pictures on their accounts.Just a few weeks ago, in a heartfelt conversation with PEOPLE, Megan Thee Stallion spoke about love as she said, “Well, I don't never want to tell [anybody] to just jump in a relationship just because everybody else got one, and I'm not going to tell you to just jump in a relationship because you have to…”The “Hiss” rapper addendum “I didn't even know I was going to be in my relationship, to be honest. I think that because finally I started being in a better mind space about myself and my life, and I had already been doing a lot of work to heal me…”The three time Grammy winner continued, “I had been going to therapy, I had a bunch of activities that I started doing for myself; maybe God just opened up that space for me to have somebody that loved me right."Over the last few months, Megan Thee Stallion has often admitted her love and admiration for Klay Thompson as she called him the “kindest person”.Amid this, there have also been strong engagement rumors but it seems the power couple are focused on their respective successful careers at the moment.
Article Summary: Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson have been together for close to a year. There have been rumours that the two have removed each other from their respective social media accounts. Though this has led to many break up rumors, both of them have stayed away from such speculations.

Article Title: "This is a satanic administration": Candace Owens sparks online storm with latest comments targeting the White House
Article Text:
Candace Owens is facing widespread backlash after controversial remarks sparked intense debate online. A viral response criticizing her influence and rhetoric has further fueled the discussion. Her statements have divided opinion, with some supporting her stance while others see it as extreme. The controversy highlights growing tensions and shifting dynamics within political commentary on social media platforms.

Candace Owens ignites fresh controversy with remarks about Donald Trump







The most recent online storm involving Candace Owens didn't start with a press conference or a TV show. A post that spread quickly and hit hard started it, like many modern controversies do. Saul Sadka had a strong reaction to Owens' recent comments, and within hours, the discussion had turned into a full-blown debate on social media.The intensity is what makes this moment different. It's a sharper tone. The reactions seem more personal. Owens has always been a divisive figure, but this latest exchange has made things even more so. It's not just about politics anymore. It has to do with power, trust, and where public figures stand as audiences change.Saul Sadka did not hold back when addressing Candace Owens. He wrote, "Candace Owens is calling for world leaders to unite to replace Trump because it is slowly dawning on her that she was radicalized by foreign-funded bots and fake viewing figures into becoming a marginal, crankish clown in her homeland."He added, "Escalated into pure insanity, Pavlovian dopamine-style, by Third Worldists trying to turn her into a weapon.But now she is all used up, her mission failed, and she can see her new shiny replacements, like Joe Kent and Carrie Prejean Boller, being boosted to take her place."The post gained traction quickly, not just for its language but for what it implied. It questioned Owens’ influence and hinted at a changing landscape where new voices may be rising.At the center of it all are Owens’ own words, which have sparked strong reactions. She stated, "This is a satanic administration. We all realize that satanic Zionists occupy the White House and Congress needs to move to have the Mad King Trump removed. All of our lives may depend upon other countries realizing that Trump is deeply unwell and surrounded by religious fanatics who have convinced him that he is a messiah. We are in uncharted territory. Leaders worldwide need to act accordingly."For some, her remarks reflect frustration and urgency. For others, they go too far. That split is now playing out in real time, with opinions forming just as quickly as they are shared.

Article Title: Sidney Crosby: Sidney Crosby of Pittsburgh Penguins dominates Florida Panthers' Matthew Tkachuk in viral NHL game moment clash

The recent NHL game between the Pittsburgh Penguins and the Florida Panthers provided a viral clip that was not anticipated, even though the stakes of the two teams were different. As Pittsburgh was still fighting to gain a place in the playoffs, Florida went into the game with its normal aggressive approach, with an aim of keeping the intensity.A good deal of the match consisted of physical play, as the Panthers tried to break the rhythm of the Penguins with heavy checking. Yet, there was one specific play that involved Sidney Crosby and Matthew Tkachuk that caused the refocusing of attention completely, as it was one of the most discussed NHL updates of the night.The climax point was when Matthew Tkachuk left the penalty box and went to chase the puck through the boards at once, seeing a chance to make a strong hit on Sidney Crosby. Tkachuk was an aggressive player who tried to assert himself using his body in open play as the Penguins' captain.The result, however, was very different. When the two players hit each other in the shoulders, Crosby held himself in a very easy way and moved slightly.Tkachuk, in his turn, went flying off the blow and tumbled to the ice clumsily, which caused noticeable displays of fans and players.The play soon became a viral cause of sensation, and many people saw it as a statement of the strength, stability, and experience of Crosby. Crosby was not the biggest player on the ice, but his positioning and core strength enabled him to play off what would have been a heavy hit.In a larger view, the moment was also an indication of the contrasting styles of both teams. The Panthers needed to use aggressive forechecking and physicality, which did not bring the desired outcome in this case, and the Penguins proved their ability to remain calm under the pressure.Since NHL news roundup debates are still going on, the event has been a highlight of how experience in terms of awareness can beat pure physical will. It is also another memorable clip in the long career of Sidney Crosby, which is strengthening the reason why he is regarded as one of the most respected players in the league.
Article Summary: Pittsburgh Penguins' star Sidney Crosby shrugs off Florida Panthers' Matthew Tkachuk hit. Crosby held himself in a very easy way and moved slightly. Rory McIlroy and Erica Stoll marriage timeline and divorce filing details explained

Rory McIlroy’s personal life is again in focus, and this time it is not about golf. A new book by Alan Shipnuck has shared fresh details about his brief divorce filing from Erica Stoll in May 2024 and the rumors that followed. The couple, who have been married since 2017, shocked fans when McIlroy filed for divorce in Florida, calling the marriage “irretrievably broken.” But just one month later, he changed course. In his own words, “Erica and I have realized that our best future was as a family together.” The timing made it even bigger news. This all happened just after he won the Wells Fargo Championship in North Carolina. Around the same time, reports and online talk started linking him with golf reporter Amanda Balionis. While people close to both have said there was no relationship, the chatter grew fast. Stoll, who worked with the PGA of America, helped McIlroy reach his tee on time. That moment slowly turned into a relationship.After keeping things private for a while, they went public in 2015 and married in 2017 in Ireland.But life after marriage was not always smooth. In Shipnuck’s book, people close to the couple describe a gap in lifestyle. McIlroy enjoys the spotlight and media, while Stoll prefers a quiet life. She rarely gives interviews and often stays home with their daughter, Poppy, instead of traveling on tour.When the divorce filing came in May 2024, it felt sudden. Even McIlroy later admitted it was a “wake-up call.” Within weeks, the couple decided not to separate, showing that the situation may not have been as final as it first seemed.The rumors involving Amanda Balionis added more pressure to an already tense time. During a post-win interview, the two shared a relaxed moment, laughing and talking openly. One line stood out when McIlroy said, “It feels like the stars are aligning.” Soon after, news of the divorce filing broke, which made people connect the two events.Still, Shipnuck writes that both sides denied any romantic link. He also noted that most questions he received while researching the book were about McIlroy and Balionis, showing how much attention the story got.The book also compares McIlroy’s situation with Tiger Woods and his past marriage with Elin Nordegren. However, it clearly states that no cheating claims like those in Woods’ case were ever made against McIlroy.As of now, McIlroy is focused on golf again. With Erica Stoll and their daughter expected to support him during big events like the Masters, he seems to have moved forward, both personally and professionally.
